mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mbr_member_card ( tenant_id, member_id, card_no, card_type, status, issued_date, expire_date, issued_reason, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, version ) VALUES ( #{c.tenantId}, #{c.memberId}, #{c.cardNo}, #{c.cardType}, COALESCE(#{c.status},'ACTIVE'), COALESCE(#{c.issuedDate}, CURRENT_DATE), #{c.expireDate}, #{c.issuedReason}, now(), #{c.createdBy}, now(), #{c.createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE mbr_member_card SET status = COALESCE(#{c.status}, status), expire_date = COALESCE(#{c.expireDate}, expire_date), issued_reason = COALESCE(#{c.issuedReason}, issued_reason), updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{c.updatedBy} WHERE id = #{c.id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mbr_member_card WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
